posts.title: ATT&CK in plain language: Unsecured Credentials (T1552).
posts.excerpt: The technique: attackers hunt for credentials left lying around. Hardcoded keys in source code, passwords in config files, tokens in build logs, secre

posts.title: ATT&CK in plain language: Valid Accounts (T1078).
posts.excerpt: The technique: attackers do not always break in. Often they simply log in, using legitimate credentials they stole, bought, or found.
